zh.lifeSummary: Ruth Ann Williams於1199年出生在英國。她於1224年與Lord Charles Thomas Wielher II在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1265年在她的家鄉享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Ruth Ann Williams于1199年出生在英国。她于1224年与Lord Charles Thomas Wielher II在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1265年在她的家乡享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Williams
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of William , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. This form of the surname is also common in Wales. In North America, this surname has also absorbed some cognates from other languages, such as Dutch Willems . Williams is the third most frequent surname in the US. It is also very common among African Americans and Native Americans.

History: This surname was brought to North America from southern England and Wales independently by many different bearers from the 17th century onward. Roger Williams, born in London in 1603, came to MA in 1630, but the clergyman was banished from the colony for his criticism of the Puritan government; he fled to RI and founded Providence.

variants.name: Wiliams
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of   Williams  .

variants.name: William
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name William, Willam, Willem, an Old Picard and Norman French form of ancient Germanic Willihelm, composed of the elements wil- ‘will, desire’ + helm- ‘helmet, protection’. This Norman personal name became widely used in England, Scotland and Wales after the Conquest, mainly no doubt in honor of the Conqueror himself. By the 13th century it had already become the most popular personal name in England. A Parisian form of the name Guillaume was also sometimes used (see Gillam ), which in medieval Wales was adopted as Gwilym (see Gwilliam ).
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Guillaume  .

variants.name: Pulliam
meanings: Welsh and English: Anglicized form of Welsh ap William ‘son of William’ (see Williams ). This surname is very rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Ruth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (of uncertain derivation) of a Moabite woman who left her own people to remain with her mother-in-law Naomi, and afterwards became the wife of Boaz and an ancestress of David. Her story is told in the book of the Bible that bears her name. It was used among the Puritans in England in the 16th century, partly because of its association with the English vocabulary word ruth meaning ‘compassion’. It has always been popular as a Jewish name, but is now also widespread among people of many different cultures and creeds.

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Ruth Ann Williams was born in 1199, in England. She married Lord Charles Thomas Wielher II in 1224, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1265, in her hometown, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Ruth Ann Williams est née en 1199, à Angleterre. Elle a épousé Lord Charles Thomas Wielher II en 1224, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1265, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Ruth Ann Williams wurde 1199 in England geboren. Sie hat 1224 in England Lord Charles Thomas Wielher II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1265 im Alter von 66 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Ruth Ann Williams è nata il nel 1199 nel England. Lei sposato Lord Charles Thomas Wielher II nel 1224, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1265, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ruth Ann Williamsは1199年にイギリスで生まれた。1224年にイギリスでLord Charles Thomas Wielher IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1265年に故郷で66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ruth Ann Williams(은)는 1199년 영국에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1224년 영국에서 Lord Charles Thomas Wielher II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1265년 그녀의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Ruth Ann Williams nasceu em 1199, em Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Lord Charles Thomas Wielher II em 1224, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1265, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Ruth Ann Williams родилась в 1199 г. в местности Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord Charles Thomas Wielher II в 1224 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1265 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Ruth Ann Williams nació en 1199, en Inglaterra. Se casó con Lord Charles Thomas Wielher II en 1224, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1265, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años.
